pages.text: Combat heavy-melee class. The leanest catalogue — nine items. Crafts the Warrior armor set (iron-block plastron, chain pauldrons), the Berserker armor set (netherite-ingot torso), and the Warrior spell book. Netherite Warrior and Berserker variants stay vanilla smithing-table upgrades from the base sets.$(br2)Generic plate and generic melee weapons live with the Armorer and Blacksmith classes.
